scenes.name: Line Chart
scenes.description: Animated line graph with points appearing and line drawing between them. Shows a single metric changing over time. Great for growth stories.
scenes.inputSchema: title, dataPoints: number[], xLabels: string[], yLabel, lineColor?

scenes.name: Area Chart
scenes.description: Multiple filled area series stacked or overlapping. Shows cumulative volume or multi-metric comparison over time.
scenes.inputSchema: title, xLabels: string[], series: {name, data[], color}[]

scenes.name: Bar Chart (Horizontal)
scenes.description: Horizontal animated progress bars with spring physics and count-up numbers. Scorecard/dashboard style.

scenes.name: Donut Ring Chart
scenes.description: Multi-segment ring chart that fills progressively. Center shows count-up number. Legend items stagger in.

scenes.name: Pie Chart
scenes.description: Classic animated pie with slices drawing in sequentially. Labels outside with connector lines.

scenes.name: Bar Race
scenes.description: Animated bar chart where bars reorder as values change over time rounds. Shows competitions/rankings evolving.
scenes.inputSchema: title, rounds: {label, values: Record<string, number>}[], barColors?

scenes.name: Radial Bar Chart
scenes.description: Bars extend outward from a central circle like a sunburst. Great for multi-category comparison in circular layout.

scenes.name: Gauge Dial
scenes.description: Speedometer-style gauge with animated needle, colored zones, and count-up value.
scenes.inputSchema: title, value, maxValue, label, sublabel, zones: {from, to, color}[]

scenes.name: Heatmap
scenes.description: Color-intensity grid where cells represent values. Row and column labels. Cells stagger in.

scenes.name: Bubble Chart
scenes.description: Positioned circles with labels. Size encodes value. Shows multi-variable relationships on XY plane.
scenes.inputSchema: title, bubbles: {label, value, x, y, color?}[]

scenes.name: Bullet Chart
scenes.description: Horizontal bars showing actual vs target with a max range. Progress-against-goal visualization.

scenes.name: Dumbbell Chart
scenes.description: Connected dot pairs showing before/after values. Visualizes change or gap between two data points per category.
scenes.inputSchema: title, items: {label, before, after}[], beforeLabel, afterLabel, maxValue?

scenes.name: Gantt Chart
scenes.description: Horizontal bars on a time axis showing task duration and overlap. Project management style.
scenes.inputSchema: title, tasks: {label, start, end, color?}[], timeLabels[], totalUnits

scenes.name: Lollipop Chart
scenes.description: Vertical stems with dots at top. Cleaner alternative to bar charts for comparing values across categories.

scenes.name: Polar Area Chart
scenes.description: Wedge segments radiating from center with varying radii. Nightingale rose chart style.

scenes.name: Scatter Plot
scenes.description: Animated dots appearing on XY plane. Multiple color categories with legend. Shows correlation and clusters.
scenes.inputSchema: title, xLabel, yLabel, categories: {name, points: {x,y}[], color}[]

scenes.name: Stacked Area Chart
scenes.description: Multiple filled area series stacked on top of each other. Shows part-to-whole over time.

scenes.name: Stacked Bar Chart
scenes.description: Vertical bars with stacked colored segments. Shows composition breakdown per category.

scenes.name: Sparkline Grid
scenes.description: Grid of mini sparkline charts with labels and values. Dashboard-style multi-metric overview.
scenes.inputSchema: title, metrics: {label, value, suffix?, data[], color?}[]

scenes.name: Time Series (Multi-Line)
scenes.description: Multiple line series on the same axes for comparing trends. Legend with color-coded labels.
scenes.inputSchema: title, yLabel, xLabels[], series: {name, data[], color}[]

scenes.name: Treemap
scenes.description: Proportionally sized rectangles with labels. Shows hierarchical data as nested rectangles.

scenes.name: Waterfall Chart
scenes.description: Floating bars showing incremental positive/negative steps leading to a total. Financial bridge chart.

scenes.name: Glow Line Chart
scenes.description: Line chart with glowing orange trace on dark navy background. Big stat overlay. Dramatic style.

scenes.name: Stock Ticker
scenes.description: Horizontally scrolling ticker tape showing items with values and change indicators (up/down arrows).
scenes.inputSchema: items: {label, value, change, up: boolean}[], speed?

scenes.name: Circular Progress Ring
scenes.description: Single animated circular progress ring with count-up percentage in center. Clean single-metric display.

scenes.name: Content Funnel
scenes.description: Tapering funnel stages from wide to narrow. Shows conversion/drop-off through pipeline stages.

scenes.name: Hexagon Grid
scenes.description: Honeycomb-style hexagonal grid with icons and labels inside each cell. Staggers in.

scenes.name: Metric Dashboard
scenes.description: Multi-widget dashboard with mixed types: numbers, bars, sparklines, rings. Full dashboard feel.
scenes.inputSchema: title, widgets: {type: 'number'|'bar'|'spark'|'ring', label, value, suffix?, data?, color?}[]

scenes.name: Number Ticker
scenes.description: Large rolling odometer-style number counters with labels. Multiple counters animate simultaneously.

scenes.name: Percentage Glow
scenes.description: Giant glowing percentage number with label. Neon glow effect on dark background. Hero stat moment.

scenes.name: Pulsing Radar Chart
scenes.description: Animated radar/spider chart with pulsing data polygon. Shows multi-axis skill/metric assessment.

scenes.name: Stats Grid
scenes.description: Grid of stat cards with count-up numbers, labels, and suffixes. Core data display scene.

scenes.name: Tag Cloud
scenes.description: Animated word cloud where font size represents weight. Tags float and stagger in.

scenes.name: Connected Nodes Graph
scenes.description: Nodes with labels connected by animated edges. Shows relationships and network structure.
scenes.inputSchema: title, nodes: {label, x, y}[], connections: {from, to}[]

scenes.name: Nebula Clouds
scenes.description: Morphing nebula clouds with twinkling stars. Deep-space atmosphere. Slow, cosmic feel.

scenes.name: Starfield Warp
scenes.description: Stars fly outward from center creating hyperspace/warp effect. Accelerates over time.

scenes.name: Galaxy Spiral
scenes.description: Slowly rotating galaxy spiral with layered stars. Majestic cosmic backdrop.

scenes.name: Constellation
scenes.description: Star points with connecting lines forming constellation patterns. Night-sky feel.

scenes.name: Meteor Shower
scenes.description: Diagonal streaks of light raining across the screen like shooting stars. Fast-paced cosmic energy.

scenes.name: Particle Explosion
scenes.description: Particles explode outward then gravity pulls them back. Big-bang energy.

scenes.name: Particle Vortex
scenes.description: Particles swirl in a vortex/tornado pattern. Converging energy toward center.

scenes.name: Electric Arc
scenes.description: Animated electric arcs/lightning bolts crackling across the screen. High-energy feel.

scenes.name: Glowing Orbs
scenes.description: Softly glowing bokeh-style orbs floating and pulsing. Ambient, calm atmosphere.

scenes.name: Firefly Field
scenes.description: Tiny glowing dots drifting like fireflies on a warm evening. Organic, gentle movement.

scenes.name: Gravity Well
scenes.description: Particles pulled toward a central gravity point. Warping spacetime visual effect.

scenes.name: Rising Bubbles
scenes.description: Translucent bubbles rising from bottom to top. Underwater/champagne feel.

scenes.name: Bouncing Dots
scenes.description: Colorful dots bouncing with physics collisions. Playful, energetic, kinetic feel.

scenes.name: Circuit Board
scenes.description: Animated PCB-style circuit traces lighting up. Technology/hardware aesthetic.

scenes.name: Data Stream
scenes.description: Flowing streams of data particles moving in curved paths. Digital data flow aesthetic.

scenes.name: Digital Rain Drop
scenes.description: Matrix-style falling digital characters. Hacker aesthetic with glowing trails.

scenes.name: Neural Pulse
scenes.description: Neural network-style nodes with pulses traveling along connections. AI/brain aesthetic.

scenes.name: Hologram Grid
scenes.description: Perspective grid floor with holographic lines. Tron-style futuristic ground plane.

scenes.name: Crosshair Scan
scenes.description: Animated crosshair/reticle scanning across screen with HUD elements. Targeting/analysis aesthetic.

scenes.name: Pulse Grid
scenes.description: Grid of dots with wave pulse rippling outward from center. Responsive/reactive feel.

scenes.name: Geometric Mesh
scenes.description: Animated wireframe mesh of triangles/polygons morphing. Low-poly aesthetic.

scenes.name: Hex Wave
scenes.description: Hexagonal grid with wave patterns rippling through. Honeycomb-meets-ocean aesthetic.

scenes.name: Concentric Rings
scenes.description: Expanding concentric circles radiating from center. Sonar/target/ripple aesthetic.

scenes.name: Triangle Mosaic
scenes.description: Tessellating triangles with color shifts creating mosaic patterns. Low-poly art.

scenes.name: Kaleidoscope
scenes.description: Symmetrically mirrored rotating patterns creating kaleidoscope effect. Hypnotic movement.

scenes.name: Diamond Rain
scenes.description: Diamond/gem shapes falling with sparkle trails. Luxury/premium aesthetic.

scenes.name: Aurora Borealis
scenes.description: Undulating aurora borealis curtains with shifting colors. Majestic natural phenomenon.

scenes.name: Ocean Wave
scenes.description: Animated ocean waves with fluid motion. Calming blue water aesthetics.

scenes.name: Liquid Blob
scenes.description: Morphing liquid blobs like a lava lamp. Smooth organic shapes shifting colors.

scenes.name: Smoke Wisp
scenes.description: Wispy smoke tendrils floating and curling. Mysterious, ethereal atmosphere.

scenes.name: Snowfall
scenes.description: Gentle snowflakes falling with varying sizes and speeds. Peaceful winter atmosphere.

scenes.name: Plasma Field
scenes.description: Vivid flowing plasma energy field with color gradients. High-energy abstract background.

scenes.name: Warp Tunnel
scenes.description: Flying through a glowing tunnel/tube. Warp-speed corridor effect.

scenes.name: DNA Helix
scenes.description: Rotating 3D DNA double helix with glowing rungs. Science/biotech aesthetic.

scenes.name: Torus
scenes.description: Rotating wireframe torus (donut shape) with glowing edges. 3D loop aesthetic.

scenes.name: Rotating Cube
scenes.description: Wireframe cube rotating in 3D space with glowing edges. Clean geometric 3D.

scenes.name: Spiral
scenes.description: Rotating spiral pattern drawing inward. Fibonacci/golden ratio aesthetic.

scenes.name: Infinity Loop
scenes.description: Glowing figure-eight infinity symbol with particles tracing the path.

scenes.name: Prism Refraction
scenes.description: Light beam splitting through a prism into rainbow spectrum. Pink Floyd-style optics.

scenes.name: Light Trails
scenes.description: Neon light trails streaking across like long-exposure city traffic. Speed and motion.

scenes.name: Flowing Lines
scenes.description: Smooth parallel curves flowing and undulating. Elegant, minimal motion.

scenes.name: Waveform
scenes.description: Audio waveform/equalizer bars pulsing up and down. Music/audio visualization.

scenes.name: Pendulum Wave
scenes.description: Row of pendulums swinging at slightly different frequencies creating wave patterns. Satisfying physics.

scenes.name: Wave Collapse
scenes.description: Wave interference patterns collapsing and reforming. Quantum physics aesthetic.

scenes.name: Shatter Glass
scenes.description: Screen shatters into glass-like fragments that fly outward. Dramatic destruction effect.

scenes.name: Pixel Dissolve
scenes.description: Screen dissolves into pixel fragments that scatter. Digital disintegration effect.

scenes.name: Floating Glyphs
scenes.description: Unicode/mystical glyphs floating and rotating slowly. Ancient wisdom aesthetic.

scenes.name: Pulse Ripple
scenes.description: Central icon with expanding pulse rings emanating outward. Radar/impact ripple effect.

scenes.name: Typewriter Quote
scenes.description: Types out a quote character-by-character with blinking cursor. Author fades in after.

scenes.name: Key Insight
scenes.description: Two-tone text with white lead-in and cyan highlight phrase. Emphasizes the key insight.

scenes.name: Dual Color Text
scenes.description: Statements with white text and cyan-highlighted key words. Staggered fade-in per statement.

scenes.name: Glitch Text
scenes.description: Two lines of text with RGB offset glitch distortion. Cyberpunk aesthetic.

scenes.name: Word By Word
scenes.description: Words appear one at a time with animated highlights. Kinetic typography effect.

scenes.name: Text Mask Reveal
scenes.description: Large text revealed through an animated mask/wipe effect. Cinematic text unveil.

scenes.name: Spotlight Reveal
scenes.description: Text revealed by a moving spotlight beam sweeping across. Theatrical unveil.

scenes.name: Matrix Rain Text
scenes.description: Matrix-style falling code rain with featured title text in foreground. Hacker aesthetic with readable text.

scenes.name: Gradient Quote Card
scenes.description: Quote on vibrant pink-purple-blue gradient. Key phrase gets a blue highlight box behind it.

scenes.name: Impact Text
scenes.description: Full-screen bold ALL CAPS text on dark bg. Spring scale-in with glow. Maximum dramatic impact.

scenes.name: Animated Checklist
scenes.description: Animated checklist with items appearing and getting checked off sequentially. Clean list layout.

scenes.name: Photo Collage
scenes.description: Positioned cards/images in a collage layout with staggered animations. Pinterest-style layout.

scenes.name: Feature Spotlight
scenes.description: Single feature highlighted with large icon, description, and key metric. Focused product feature.

scenes.name: Flip Card
scenes.description: Card that flips from front to back revealing hidden information. 3D flip animation.

scenes.name: Goldilocks Scale
scenes.description: Three-point scale with 'too little', 'just right', 'too much'. Goldilocks principle visual.

scenes.name: Horizontal Scroll Cards
scenes.description: Cards scroll horizontally across screen. Carousel-style content presentation.

scenes.name: Icon Grid
scenes.description: Grid of items with icons/emojis and labels. Clean feature/benefit grid layout.

scenes.name: Layered Cards Stack
scenes.description: Cards stacked with depth/offset that fan out. Z-layered card reveal.

scenes.name: Masonry Reveal
scenes.description: Masonry (variable-height) grid cards staggering in. Pinterest-style waterfall layout.

scenes.name: Orbiting Icons
scenes.description: Icons/labels orbiting around a center element. Shows ecosystem/satellite relationships.

scenes.name: Parallax Layers
scenes.description: Text layers at different depths moving at different speeds. Parallax scrolling effect.

scenes.name: Phone Mockup
scenes.description: Phone device frame with animated checklist UI inside. Shows mobile app/interface content.

scenes.name: Process Flow
scenes.description: Horizontal process steps connected by arrows. Workflow/pipeline visualization.

scenes.name: Progress Steps
scenes.description: Numbered step indicators with one highlighted as active. Progress stepper component.

scenes.name: Progressive Sections
scenes.description: Numbered sections that reveal progressively. Chapter listing / agenda style.

scenes.name: Sliding Panels
scenes.description: Numbered panels that slide in horizontally one by one. Tab-style layout reveal.

scenes.name: Two Column Layout
scenes.description: Two-column layout with headers and item lists per side. Side-by-side content presentation.
scenes.inputSchema: title, leftHeader, rightHeader, leftItems: {icon?, text}[], rightItems: {icon?, text}[]

scenes.name: Quote Carousel
scenes.description: Multiple quotes cycling through with fade transitions. Testimonial carousel.

scenes.name: Forcing Functions Grid
scenes.description: Circular gear icons with blue rounded label buttons on pink-purple gradient. Grid layout.

scenes.name: Checklist Sidebar
scenes.description: Dark sidebar with grouped checklist categories. Items check off sequentially. Organized panel.

scenes.name: If-Then Rules
scenes.description: IF → THEN rule pairs displayed as connected cards. Cause and effect visualization.

scenes.name: Three Column Comparison
scenes.description: Three era/plan cards side by side. Center card highlighted with glow. Items stagger in.

scenes.name: Split Screen
scenes.description: Screen split vertically with different content on each side. Direct side-by-side comparison.
scenes.inputSchema: leftHeader, leftItems[], leftColor, rightHeader, rightItems[], rightColor

scenes.name: Before / After
scenes.description: Before and after panels showing transformation. Clear visual upgrade/change.

scenes.name: Silhouette Group Comparison
scenes.description: Two groups of silhouettes with bold stats. Curved arrow between. Shows A/B study results.
scenes.inputSchema: title, leftLabel, leftStat, leftStatColor, rightLabel, rightStat, rightStatColor

scenes.name: Hook / Opener
scenes.description: Video opener with white + cyan title text and subtitle. Grabs attention as first scene.

scenes.name: Section Number
scenes.description: Large section number with title. Chapter divider between video sections.

scenes.name: Countdown Reveal
scenes.description: Countdown from N to 1 then reveals text. Builds suspense before a big reveal.

scenes.name: Milestone Path
scenes.description: Connected milestone nodes along a path. Shows progress/journey through points.

scenes.name: Vertical Timeline
scenes.description: Vertical timeline with alternating left/right milestone entries. Chronological event display.

scenes.name: Gradient Wave Title
scenes.description: Title text on animated gradient wave background. Section header with motion.

scenes.name: Zoom Through Layers
scenes.description: Camera zooms through successive text layers revealing deeper content. Drill-down effect.

scenes.name: Trust Formula
scenes.description: Visual equation/formula with numbered terms and header. Shows components that make up a concept.
scenes.inputSchema: header, formulaLeft, formulaTerms: string[], formulaSections: {num, title, points[]}[]

scenes.name: Mountain Journey Path
scenes.description: Mountain silhouette with glowing SVG path ascending. 5 numbered stops. Red flag at summit.

scenes.name: System Principle Card
scenes.description: Numbered principle card with title and description. Clean single-principle display.

scenes.name: Cinematic Outro
scenes.description: Cinematic fade-out ending with title, tagline, and call to action. Professional video closer.

scenes.name: Ending Questions
scenes.description: Discussion questions displayed as ending cards. Drives audience engagement and comments.

scenes.name: Grand Finale
scenes.description: Keywords explode outward in a grand finale celebration. Climactic ending with particle burst.

scenes.name: Testimonial Quote
scenes.description: Styled testimonial card with quote, author name, and role. Social proof display.

scenes.name: Viewer Circle Stats
scenes.description: Circle of viewer avatars with highlighted subset showing a statistic. Community engagement visual.

scenes.name: Neon Brain
scenes.description: Glowing neon brain illustration with pulsing text. Cognitive/thinking visual metaphor.

scenes.name: Lower Third
scenes.description: Animated lower-third name/title bar. Standard broadcast-style speaker identification.

scenes.name: Pill Badges
scenes.description: Colorful pill-shaped badges/tags appearing with spring animation. Category/tag display.

scenes.name: Ken Burns
scenes.description: Cinematic Ken Burns with organic floating feel. Smooth start→end camera interpolation plus Perlin noise micro-drift. Supports direction presets (zoom-in, pan-left, orbit, etc.), rotation, 3D perspective, multiple easing curves, and organic noise drift.
scenes.inputSchema: src (file), isVideo?, startFrom?, endAt?, volume?, direction?, startZoom?, endZoom?, startPanX?, endPanX?, startPanY?, endPanY?, startRotation?, endRotation?, easing?, noiseIntensity?, noiseSeed?, perspective?

scenes.name: Smart Camera
scenes.description: Keyframe-driven virtual cinematography on a static image. Define camera keyframes (zoom, panX, panY, rotateX, rotateY) at specific frames and it smoothly interpolates between them with easing curves. Creates cinematic camera movements over screenshots, diagrams, or any still image.
scenes.inputSchema: imageSrc (file), cameraKeyframes: {frame, zoom, panX, panY, rotateY, rotateX, easing, label, holdFrames}[], isStaticFile?, imageWidth?, imageHeight?

scenes.name: Handheld Camera
scenes.description: Floating organic camera motion with optional Ken Burns drift. Uses 4-layer Perlin noise for ultra-smooth motion. Supports directional drift (zoom in/out, pan), speed control, 3D perspective. Like a Steadicam operator — smooth, purposeful, always alive.
scenes.inputSchema: imageSrc? (file), videoSrc? (file), isVideo?, startFrom?, endAt?, volume?, objectFit?, intensity? (0-1), speed?, baseZoom?, basePanX?, basePanY?, driftZoom?, driftPanX?, driftPanY?, driftRotation?, perspective?, seed?

scenes.name: Video Smart Camera
scenes.description: Smart camera on actual video. Plays a real video file with keyframe-driven camera movements (zoom, pan, perspective) and optional highlight overlays synced to content. Same camera intelligence as SmartCamera but on live video instead of a still image.
scenes.inputSchema: videoSrc (file), startFrom?, endAt?, volume?, objectFit?, cameraKeyframes?: {frame, zoom, panX, panY, rotateY, rotateX, easing, label, holdFrames}[], highlights?: {label, x, y, w, h, startTime, endTime?, color?, style?}[]

scenes.name: Spotlight
scenes.description: Video/image with spotlight focus effect. Dims the entire frame EXCEPT circular or rectangular spotlight areas. Spotlights can track multiple regions sequentially, creating a 'follow the spotlight' effect. Perfect for drawing attention to specific UI elements, faces, or details.
scenes.inputSchema: src (file), isVideo?, startFrom?, endAt?, volume?, spotlights: {x, y, radius, shape?, startFrame, endFrame?, label?}[], dimAmount?, feather?

scenes.name: Picture in Picture
scenes.description: Video with a PIP overlay. Main content fills the frame while a smaller inset shows a second source (video or image) in a rounded frame. PIP can be positioned in any corner with configurable size, border, and enter/exit animations. Classic 'speaker in corner' layout.
scenes.inputSchema: mainVideoSrc (file), pipSrc (file), pipIsVideo?, pip: {position, size, borderRadius, borderColor, borderWidth, margin, enterFrame?, exitFrame?, pipAspectRatio?}, volume?

scenes.name: Split Compare
scenes.description: Side-by-side or top/bottom split comparison of two video segments or images. Supports static 50/50 split or animated wipe reveal. Each side can be independently sourced (video or image) with labels. Great for before/after, A vs B, or two camera angles.
scenes.inputSchema: left: {src, isVideo?, startFrom?, label?, labelColor?}, right: {src, isVideo?, startFrom?, label?, labelColor?}, direction?, mode?, wipeStartFrame?, dividerColor?, volume?

scenes.name: Text Callout
scenes.description: Video/image with animated text callout overlays. Shows labels/annotations pointing to specific regions on screen with optional arrow/line and background pill. Multiple callouts can appear and disappear at timed intervals. Perfect for 'This is the manifest file →' style annotations.
scenes.inputSchema: src (file), isVideo?, startFrom?, endAt?, volume?, callouts: {text, x, y, targetX, targetY, enterFrame, exitFrame?, bgColor?, textColor?, lineColor?, fontSize?}[]

scenes.name: Image Text Highlight
scenes.description: Marker-pen highlight over words in a screenshot/image. Overlays translucent highlight bands that look like someone drew over text with a real highlighter pen. Each word animates with a left→right swipe reveal, and previously highlighted words remain visible. Authentic hand-drawn marker feel. LEGACY — includes built-in camera. Use ImageHighlight for composable version.
scenes.inputSchema: imageSrc (file), isStaticFile?, regions: {label, x, y, w, h, startFrame}[], highlightColor?, highlightOpacity?, readOpacity?, borderRadius?, imageWidth?, imageHeight?

scenes.name: Image Highlight / Underline
scenes.description: Pure highlight or underline overlay on an image — NO built-in camera. Two modes: 'highlight' fills regions with translucent color; 'underline' draws a colored line at the bottom of each region and dims non-region areas to focus attention. Draw regions on the image and they animate sequentially. Compose with SmartCamera or PerspectiveZoom to add camera movement. The recommended highlight/underline scene for the editor.
scenes.inputSchema: imageSrc (file), isStaticFile?, mode? ('highlight'|'underline'), regions: {label?, x, y, w, h, startFrame?, color?, opacity?, animation?, borderRadius?, group?}[], framesPerRegion?, startOffset?, highlightColor?, activeOpacity?, doneOpacity?, blendMode?, animation?, borderRadius?, backgroundColor?, dimAmount?, underlineThickness?, underlineColor?, imageWidth?, imageHeight?

scenes.name: Enhanced Marker Highlight
scenes.description: Word-tracking marker highlight with cinematic camera. Camera FOLLOWS each word like a reading eye — zooms to ~2.5x and pans to keep the active word centered. Goes through phases: entrance → overview → zoom-in → tracking → hold → zoom-out. Creates a dramatic 'reading along' effect with marker highlights and camera movement combined.
scenes.inputSchema: imageSrc (file), isStaticFile?, regions: {label, x, y, w, h, startFrame, line?}[], highlightColor?, glowColor?, trackingZoom?, targetScreenX?, targetScreenY?, imageWidth?, imageHeight?

scenes.name: Speaker with Captions
scenes.description: Speaker video with animated caption overlay. Captions appear as the speaker talks.
scenes.inputSchema: videoSrc (file), captions: {text, startFrame, endFrame}[], videoSrc?, volume?

scenes.name: Speaker Cozy
scenes.description: Warm cozy-style speaker layout with soft lighting aesthetic.

scenes.name: Speaker Dominant
scenes.description: Full-frame speaker video with bold presence. Speaker fills the entire frame.

scenes.name: Speaker Neon Captions
scenes.description: Speaker video with neon-glowing animated captions. Eye-catching subtitle style.
scenes.inputSchema: videoSrc (file), captions: {text, startFrame, endFrame}[], neonColor?, volume?

scenes.name: Speaker Picture-in-Picture
scenes.description: Speaker in a small PIP bubble over main content. Great for tutorials and demos.

scenes.name: Speaker Solo
scenes.description: Clean minimal speaker layout. Simple and professional.

scenes.name: Speaker Studio
scenes.description: Broadcast studio-style speaker layout with professional framing.

scenes.name: Split Speaker
scenes.description: Two speakers side by side. Perfect for interviews and conversations.

scenes.name: Warm Studio
scenes.description: Warm-toned studio speaker layout with inviting atmosphere.

scenes.name: Segmented Video
scenes.description: Plays multiple video segments back-to-back with no gaps. Handles cuts, removals, and multi-source clips — each segment has its own source, start time, and end time. Perfect for composing a final cut from trimmed clips.
scenes.inputSchema: segments: {src (file), startFrom, endAt, volume?, label?}[], volume?, objectFit?, title?

scenes.name: Light Leaks
scenes.description: Cinematic light leak overlay effect. Transparent by default — layer on top of any content. Uses @remotion/light-leaks for procedural film-style light bleeds with screen blend mode. 8 built-in presets (warm-film, cool-blue, golden-hour, rainbow, pink-dream, subtle-flare, neon-glow, cinematic-red). Supports custom multi-layer leaks with per-layer seed, hue shift, timing, and opacity. Adjustable intensity, blend mode, and background.
scenes.inputSchema: preset? (warm-film|cool-blue|golden-hour|rainbow|pink-dream|subtle-flare|neon-glow|cinematic-red), background? (color, default transparent), intensity? (0-1), blendMode? (screen|overlay|hard-light|soft-light|color-dodge), src? (file), leaks?: {seed, hueShift, startFrame, durationInFrames, opacity?}[]

scenes.name: Nested Composition
scenes.description: Composes multiple scenes as positioned layers within a single frame. Each layer is an independent scene with its own props and layout. Supports infinite nesting — a Nested Composition can contain another Nested Composition.
scenes.inputSchema: layers: {sceneType, sceneProps, layout: {x,y,width,height,zIndex?}, startOffset?, durationInFrames?, enter?, exit?, label?}[], backgroundColor?, style?

scenes.name: Perspective Zoom
scenes.description: Universal 3D camera scene. The most configurable scene in the library — replaces 15+ individual perspective/zoom scenes with one fully parameterized component. Supports: 17 camera presets, arbitrary keyframe timelines with hold+easing, multi-axis rotation, zoom arcs, N content layers with Z-depth parallax, camera shake with 5 envelope patterns, focus tracking, PIP, highlight overlays, 10+ visual effects (vignette, DOF, film grain, chromatic aberration, particles, letterbox, etc.), saber/typewriter text reveals, and 10 enter/exit transitions. Everything is JSON-drivable.
scenes.inputSchema: cameraPreset? | cameraKeyframes[]? | rotateY/X/Z+zoom+panX/Y ranges | layers[]? (image/video/text/card with z-depth) | imageSrc/videoSrc (single source) | effects? | shake? | pip? | highlights? | text? | textReveal? | enter/exit?
